name: Sima Hui (Decao)
page_title: Sima Hui (Decao) 司馬徽 (德操) – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	It was originally Pang Degong who described Zhuge Liang as ‘Sleeping Dragon’, Pang Tong as ‘Fledgling Phoenix’, and Sima Hui as ‘Water Mirror’. Sima Hui, however, did repeat this to Liu Bei. [ZZTJ 65]

full_text:
Sima Hui (Decao) 司馬徽 (德操)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Hui (司馬徽), styledDecao (德操), was born in Sima Hui is described as both a man from Yingchuan and of Xiangyang in Nan Commandery. He probably migrated south to avoid the civil war. [Rafe]. Named ‘Water Mirror’ by Pang Degong. Former teacher of Zhuge Liang and Pang Tong. Sima Hui lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
